     if(_estimate * 95 / 100 <= _userInput && _estimate * 105 / 100 >= _userInput) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x80bb124b827eed3ea211ceb61384307e659a0b8b1463347806fbd3b78c9e210a","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/DiamondSolvencyMethodsAccess.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\nimport \"@redstone-finance/evm-connector/contracts/core/ProxyConnector.sol\";\nimport \"../facets/SolvencyFacetProd.sol\";\nimport \"../DiamondHelper.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @dev Provides solvency check methods used by modifiers\n */\ncontract DiamondSolvencyMethodsAccess is DiamondHelper, ProxyConnector {\n\n    // This function executes SolvencyFacetProd.isSolvent()\n    function _isSolvent() internal virtual returns (bool solvent){\n        solvent = abi.decode(\n            proxyDelegateCalldata(\n                DiamondHelper._getFacetAddress(SolvencyFacetProd.isSolvent.selector),\n                abi.encodeWithSelector(SolvencyFacetProd.isSolvent.selector)\n            ),\n            (bool)\n        );\n    }\n\n    // This function executes SolvencyFacetProd.canRepayDebtFully()\n    function _canRepayDebtFully() internal virtual returns (bool solvent){\n        solvent = abi.decode(\n            proxyDelegateCalldata(\n                DiamondHelper._getFacetAddress(SolvencyFacetProd.canRepayDebtFully.selector),\n                abi.encodeWithSelector(SolvencyFacetProd.canRepayDebtFully.selector)\n            ),\n            (bool)\n        );\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0xf872e8ff91cb77dd0ffc298783ecab4da54ae496ba8ce341650c7b4bced84265","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/DiamondStorageLib.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\n/******************************************************************************\\\n* Author: Nick Mudge <nick@perfectabstractions.com> (https://twitter.com/mudgen)\n* EIP-2535 Diamonds: https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-2535\n/******************************************************************************/\nimport {IDiamondCut} from \"../interfaces/IDiamondCut.sol\";\nimport {LeverageTierLib} from \"../lib/LeverageTierLib.sol\";\nimport \"../lib/Bytes32EnumerableMap.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/IStakingPositions.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/facets/avalanche/ITraderJoeV2Facet.sol\";\n\n// Remember to add the loupe functions from DiamondLoupeFacet to the diamond.\n// The loupe functions are required by the EIP2535 Diamonds standard\n\nlibrary DiamondStorageLib {\n    using EnumerableMap for EnumerableMap.Bytes32ToAddressMap;\n\n    bytes32 constant DIAMOND_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.diamond.storage\");\n    bytes32 constant LIQUIDATION_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.liquidation.storage\");\n    bytes32 constant LIQUIDATION_SNAPSHOT_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.liquidation.snapshot.storage\");\n    bytes32 constant SMARTLOAN_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.smartloan.storage\");\n    bytes32 constant REENTRANCY_GUARD_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.reentrancy.guard.storage\");\n    bytes32 constant OWNED_TRADERJOE_V2_BINS_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.traderjoe_v2_bins_1685370112\");\n    //TODO: maybe we should keep here a tuple[tokenId, factory] to account for multiple Uniswap V3 deployments\n    bytes32 constant OWNED_UNISWAP_V3_TOKEN_IDS_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.uniswap_v3_token_ids_1685370112\");\n    bytes32 constant WITHDRAWAL_INTENTS_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.withdrawal.intents\");\n    bytes32 constant PRIME_LEVERAGE_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.prime.leverage.storage\");\n    // GMX Performance Fee Tracking\n    bytes32 constant GMX_POSITION_STORAGE_POSITION = keccak256(\"diamond.standard.gmx.position.storage\");\n\n    \n\n    struct FacetAddressAndPosition {\n        address facetAddress;\n        uint96 functionSelectorPosition; // position in facetFunctionSelectors.functionSelectors array\n    }\n\n    struct PrimeLeverageStorage {\n        LeverageTierLib.LeverageTier leverageTier;\n        mapping(address => uint256) tokenToStakedAmount; // Staked amount of any token, only PRIME for now.\n        uint256 recordedPrimeDebt;\n        uint256 lastPrimeDebtUpdate;\n    }\n\n    struct FacetFunctionSelectors {\n        bytes4[] functionSelectors;\n        uint256 facetAddressPosition; // position of facetAddress in facetAddresses array\n    }\n\n    struct DiamondStorage {\n        // ----------- DIAMOND-SPECIFIC VARIABLES --------------\n        // maps function selector to the facet address and\n        // the position of the selector in the facetFunctionSelectors.selectors array\n        mapping(bytes4 => FacetAddressAndPosition) selectorToFacetAndPosition;\n        // maps facet addresses to function selectors\n        mapping(address => FacetFunctionSelectors) facetFunctionSelectors;\n        // facet addresses\n        address[] facetAddresses;\n        // Used to query if a contract implements an interface.\n        // Used to implement ERC-165.\n        mapping(bytes4 => bool) supportedInterfaces;\n        // Used to select methods that can be executed even when Diamond is paused\n        mapping(bytes4 => bool) canBeExecutedWhenPaused;\n\n        bool _initialized;\n        bool _active;\n\n        uint256 _lastBorrowTimestamp;\n    }\n\n    struct SmartLoanStorage {\n        // PauseAdmin has the power to pause/unpause the contract without the timelock delay in case of a critical bug/exploit\n        address pauseAdmin;\n        // Owner of the contract\n        address contractOwner;\n        // Proposed owner of the contract\n        address proposedOwner;\n        // Proposed pauseAdmin of the contract\n        address proposedPauseAdmin;\n        // Is contract initialized?\n        bool _initialized;\n        // TODO: mock staking tokens until redstone oracle supports them\n        EnumerableMap.Bytes32ToAddressMap ownedAssets;\n        // Staked positions of the contract\n        IStakingPositions.StakedPosition[] currentStakedPositions;\n\n        // Timestamp since which the account is frozen\n        // 0 means an account that is not frozen. Any other value means that the account is frozen\n        uint256 frozenSince;\n\n        // Timestamp of the last ownership transfer\n        uint256 lastOwnershipTransferTimestamp;\n    }\n\n    struct WithdrawalIntent {\n        uint256 amount;\n        uint256 actionableAt;\n        uint256 expiresAt;\n    }\n\n    struct WithdrawalIntentsStorage {\n        // token address => WithdrawalIntent[]\n        mapping(address => WithdrawalIntent[]) intents;\n        // used to be token address => total pending amount but is no longer used. Left here to preserve the storage slot order.\n        mapping(address => uint256) _doNOTUse;\n    }\n\n    struct TraderJoeV2Storage {\n        // TJ v2 bins of the contract\n        ITraderJoeV2Facet.TraderJoeV2Bin[] ownedTjV2Bins;\n    }\n\n    struct UniswapV3Storage {\n        // UniswapV3 token IDs of the contract\n        uint256[] ownedUniswapV3TokenIds;\n    }\n\n    struct LiquidationStorage {\n        // Mapping controlling addresses that can execute the liquidation methods\n        mapping(address=>bool) canLiquidate;\n    }\n\n    struct LiquidationSnapshotStorage {\n        uint256 lastInsolventTimestamp;\n        uint256 healthRatioSnapshot;\n        /// @dev dollar-denominated (18 decimals) debt value captured when snapshotInsolvency() is called.\n        /// Used as the denominator when enforcing the cumulative pre-liquidation slippage budget.\n        uint256 debtSnapshotDollars;\n        /// @dev dollar-denominated (18 decimals) cumulative slippage loss across pre-liquidation swaps.\n        /// Enforced against `debtSnapshotDollars * MAX_CUMULATIVE_LOSS_BPS / 10_000`.\n        uint256 cumulativeLossDollars;\n    }\n\n    struct ReentrancyGuardStorage {\n        uint256 _status;\n    }\n\n    struct GmxPositionBenchmark {\n        uint256 benchmarkValueUsd;  // Position value in USD at creation\n        uint256 underlyingLongTokenAmount;  // NEW: Actual long tokens in the position\n        uint256 underlyingShortTokenAmount;\n        uint256 benchmarkTimeStamp;  // when benchmark was created/updated\n        address longTokenAddress;    // a bit duplicate considering the facet mapping, but shareable across facets for now\n        address shortTokenAddress;   // a bit duplicate considering the facet mapping, but shareable across facets for now\n        bool exists;                // Whether benchmark exists\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd;\n        uint256 longTokenPriceUsd; \n        uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd;\n    }\n\n    struct GmxPositionBenchmarkParams {\n        address market;\n        uint256 benchmarkValueUsd;\n        uint256 longTokenAmount;\n        uint256 shortTokenAmount;\n        address longToken;\n        address shortToken;\n        uint256 timestamp;\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd;\n        uint256 longTokenPriceUsd;\n        uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd;\n    }\n\n    struct GmxPositionStorage {\n        // market address => benchmark data \n        mapping(address => GmxPositionBenchmark) positionBenchmarks;\n    }\n\n    function gmxPositionStorage() internal pure returns (GmxPositionStorage storage gps) {\n        bytes32 position = GMX_POSITION_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly { gps.slot := position }\n    }\n    \n    function setGmxPositionBenchmark(GmxPositionBenchmarkParams memory params) internal {\n        GmxPositionStorage storage gps = gmxPositionStorage();\n        gps.positionBenchmarks[params.market] = GmxPositionBenchmark({\n            benchmarkValueUsd: params.benchmarkValueUsd,\n            underlyingLongTokenAmount: params.longTokenAmount,\n            underlyingShortTokenAmount: params.shortTokenAmount,\n            longTokenAddress: params.longToken,\n            shortTokenAddress: params.shortToken,\n            benchmarkTimeStamp: params.timestamp,\n            exists: true,\n            gmTokenPriceUsd: params.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n            longTokenPriceUsd: params.longTokenPriceUsd,\n            shortTokenPriceUsd: params.shortTokenPriceUsd\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Scales the underlying-token amounts of an existing benchmark by a fraction\n     *         `numerator / denominator`, to keep the per-GM cost basis intact while\n     *         removing the share of a position that was just realized as fee.\n     * @dev    Only the two `underlying*TokenAmount` fields are touched: those are the ones\n     *         read by the fee math and by the solvency-side fee deduction in\n     *         `SolvencyFacetProd`. `benchmarkValueUsd` is never read in the fee path (only\n     *         emitted for off-chain observability), so leaving it alone trims bytecode at\n     *         every consuming facet without affecting fee math.\n     */\n    function scaleGmxPositionBenchmark(address market, uint256 numerator, uint256 denominator) internal {\n        GmxPositionStorage storage gps = gmxPositionStorage();\n        GmxPositionBenchmark storage b = gps.positionBenchmarks[market];\n        b.underlyingLongTokenAmount  = (b.underlyingLongTokenAmount  * numerator) / denominator;\n        b.underlyingShortTokenAmount = (b.underlyingShortTokenAmount * numerator) / denominator;\n    }\n\n    function getGmxPositionBenchmark(address market) internal view returns (GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark) {\n        GmxPositionStorage storage gps = gmxPositionStorage();\n        benchmark = gps.positionBenchmarks[market];\n    }\n\n    function withdrawalIntentsStorage() internal pure returns (WithdrawalIntentsStorage storage wis) {\n        bytes32 position = WITHDRAWAL_INTENTS_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            wis.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    function reentrancyGuardStorage() internal pure returns (ReentrancyGuardStorage storage rgs) {\n        bytes32 position = REENTRANCY_GUARD_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            rgs.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    function traderJoeV2Storage() internal pure returns (TraderJoeV2Storage storage tjv2s) {\n        bytes32 position = OWNED_TRADERJOE_V2_BINS_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            tjv2s.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    function uniswapV3Storage() internal pure returns (UniswapV3Storage storage uv3s) {\n        bytes32 position = OWNED_UNISWAP_V3_TOKEN_IDS_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            uv3s.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n\n    // 10x leverage functions \n    function primeLeverageStorage() internal pure returns (PrimeLeverageStorage storage pls) {\n        bytes32 position = PRIME_LEVERAGE_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            pls.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    \n\n    function setPrimeLeverageTier(LeverageTierLib.LeverageTier _tier) internal {\n        primeLeverageStorage().leverageTier = _tier;\n    }\n\n    function getPrimeLeverageTier() internal view returns (LeverageTierLib.LeverageTier) {\n        return primeLeverageStorage().leverageTier;\n    }\n\n    function getPrimeDebt() internal view returns (uint256) {\n        return primeLeverageStorage().recordedPrimeDebt;\n    }\n\n    function setPrimeDebt(uint256 _debt) internal {\n        primeLeverageStorage().recordedPrimeDebt = _debt;\n    }\n\n    function getLastPrimeDebtUpdate() internal view returns (uint256) {\n        return primeLeverageStorage().lastPrimeDebtUpdate;\n    }\n\n    function setLastPrimeDebtUpdate(uint256 _timestamp) internal {\n        primeLeverageStorage().lastPrimeDebtUpdate = _timestamp;\n    }\n\n\n    function addStakedTokenAmount(address _token, uint256 _amount) internal {\n        primeLeverageStorage().tokenToStakedAmount[_token] += _amount;\n    }\n\n    function removeStakedTokenAmount(address _token, uint256 _amount) internal {\n        uint256 stakedAmount = primeLeverageStorage().tokenToStakedAmount[_token];\n        require(_amount > 0, \"Amount must be greater than zero\");\n        require(stakedAmount >= _amount, \"Insufficient staked amount\");\n        primeLeverageStorage().tokenToStakedAmount[_token] -= _amount;\n    }\n\n\n    function getStakedTokenAmount(address _token) internal view returns (uint256) {\n        return primeLeverageStorage().tokenToStakedAmount[_token];\n    }\n\n\n    function diamondStorage() internal pure returns (DiamondStorage storage ds) {\n        bytes32 position = DIAMOND_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            ds.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    function liquidationStorage() internal pure returns (LiquidationStorage storage ls) {\n        bytes32 position = LIQUIDATION_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            ls.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    function smartLoanStorage() internal pure returns (SmartLoanStorage storage sls) {\n        bytes32 position = SMARTLOAN_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            sls.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    function liquidationSnapshotStorage() internal pure returns (LiquidationSnapshotStorage storage ls) {\n        bytes32 position = LIQUIDATION_SNAPSHOT_STORAGE_POSITION;\n        assembly {\n            ls.slot := position\n        }\n    }\n\n    event OwnershipTransferred(address indexed previousOwner, address indexed newOwner);\n\n    event PauseAdminOwnershipTransferred(address indexed previousPauseAdmin, address indexed newPauseAdmin);\n\n    event AccountFrozen(address indexed freezeToken, uint256 timestamp);\n\n    event AccountUnfrozen(address indexed keeper, uint256 timestamp);\n\n    function setContractOwner(address _newOwner) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        address previousOwner = sls.contractOwner;\n        sls.contractOwner = _newOwner;\n        if(!sls._initialized){\n            sls.lastOwnershipTransferTimestamp = block.timestamp - 24 hours; // Dont block withdrawals upon account creation\n        } else {\n            sls.lastOwnershipTransferTimestamp = block.timestamp;\n        }\n        emit OwnershipTransferred(previousOwner, _newOwner);\n    }\n\n    function freezeAccount(address freezeToken) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        require(sls.frozenSince == 0, \"Account is already frozen\");\n        sls.frozenSince = block.timestamp;\n        emit AccountFrozen(freezeToken, block.timestamp);\n    }\n\n    function isAccountFrozen() internal view returns (bool){\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        return sls.frozenSince != 0;\n    }\n\n    function unfreezeAccount(address keeperAddress) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        require(sls.frozenSince != 0, \"Account is not frozen\");\n        sls.frozenSince = 0;\n        emit AccountUnfrozen(keeperAddress, block.timestamp);\n    }\n\n    function getTjV2OwnedBins() internal returns(ITraderJoeV2Facet.TraderJoeV2Bin[] storage bins){\n        TraderJoeV2Storage storage tjv2s = traderJoeV2Storage();\n        bins = tjv2s.ownedTjV2Bins;\n    }\n\n    function getTjV2OwnedBinsView() internal view returns(ITraderJoeV2Facet.TraderJoeV2Bin[] memory bins){\n        TraderJoeV2Storage storage tjv2s = traderJoeV2Storage();\n        bins = new ITraderJoeV2Facet.TraderJoeV2Bin[](tjv2s.ownedTjV2Bins.length);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < bins.length; i++) {\n            bins[i] = tjv2s.ownedTjV2Bins[i];\n        }\n    }\n\n    function getUV3OwnedTokenIds() internal returns(uint256[] storage tokenIds){\n        UniswapV3Storage storage uv3s = uniswapV3Storage();\n        tokenIds = uv3s.ownedUniswapV3TokenIds;\n    }\n\n    function getUV3OwnedTokenIdsView() internal view returns(uint256[] memory tokenIds){\n        UniswapV3Storage storage uv3s = uniswapV3Storage();\n        tokenIds = new uint256[](uv3s.ownedUniswapV3TokenIds.length);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < tokenIds.length; i++) {\n            tokenIds[i] = uv3s.ownedUniswapV3TokenIds[i];\n        }\n    }\n\n    function setContractPauseAdmin(address _newPauseAdmin) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        address previousPauseAdmin = sls.pauseAdmin;\n        sls.pauseAdmin = _newPauseAdmin;\n        emit PauseAdminOwnershipTransferred(previousPauseAdmin, _newPauseAdmin);\n    }\n\n    function contractOwner() internal view returns (address contractOwner_) {\n        contractOwner_ = smartLoanStorage().contractOwner;\n    }\n\n    function pauseAdmin() internal view returns (address pauseAdmin) {\n        pauseAdmin = smartLoanStorage().pauseAdmin;\n    }\n\n    function setProposedOwner(address _newOwner) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        sls.proposedOwner = _newOwner;\n    }\n\n    function setProposedPauseAdmin(address _newPauseAdmin) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        sls.proposedPauseAdmin = _newPauseAdmin;\n    }\n\n    function getPausedMethodExemption(bytes4 _methodSig) internal view returns (bool) {\n        DiamondStorage storage ds = diamondStorage();\n        return ds.canBeExecutedWhenPaused[_methodSig];\n    }\n\n    function proposedOwner() internal view returns (address proposedOwner_) {\n        proposedOwner_ = smartLoanStorage().proposedOwner;\n    }\n\n    function proposedPauseAdmin() internal view returns (address proposedPauseAdmin) {\n        proposedPauseAdmin = smartLoanStorage().proposedPauseAdmin;\n    }\n\n    function stakedPositions() internal view returns (IStakingPositions.StakedPosition[] storage _positions) {\n        _positions = smartLoanStorage().currentStakedPositions;\n    }\n\n    function addStakedPosition(IStakingPositions.StakedPosition memory position) internal {\n        IStakingPositions.StakedPosition[] storage positions = stakedPositions();\n\n        bool found;\n\n        for (uint256 i; i < positions.length; i++) {\n            if (positions[i].identifier == position.identifier) {\n                found = true;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (!found) {\n            positions.push(position);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function removeStakedPosition(bytes32 identifier) internal {\n        IStakingPositions.StakedPosition[] storage positions = stakedPositions();\n\n        for (uint256 i; i < positions.length; i++) {\n            if (positions[i].identifier == identifier) {\n                positions[i] = positions[positions.length - 1];\n                positions.pop();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    function addOwnedAsset(bytes32 _symbol, address _address) internal {\n        require(_symbol != \"\", \"Symbol cannot be empty\");\n        require(_address != address(0), \"Invalid AddressZero\");\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        EnumerableMap.set(sls.ownedAssets, _symbol, _address);\n        emit OwnedAssetAdded(_symbol, block.timestamp);\n    }\n\n    function hasAsset(bytes32 _symbol) internal view returns (bool){\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        return sls.ownedAssets.contains(_symbol);\n    }\n\n    function removeOwnedAsset(bytes32 _symbol) internal {\n        SmartLoanStorage storage sls = smartLoanStorage();\n        EnumerableMap.remove(sls.ownedAssets, _symbol);\n\n        emit OwnedAssetRemoved(_symbol, block.timestamp);\n    }\n\n    function enforceIsContractOwner() internal view {\n        require(msg.sender == smartLoanStorage().contractOwner, \"DiamondStorageLib: Must be contract owner\");\n    }\n\n    function enforceIsPauseAdmin() internal view {\n        require(msg.sender == smartLoanStorage().pauseAdmin, \"DiamondStorageLib: Must be contract pauseAdmin\");\n    }\n\n    event DiamondCut(IDiamondCut.FacetCut[] _diamondCut, address _init, bytes _calldata);\n\n    // Internal function version of diamondCut\n    function diamondCut(\n        IDiamondCut.FacetCut[] memory _diamondCut,\n        address _init,\n        bytes memory _calldata\n    ) internal {\n        for (uint256 facetIndex; facetIndex < _diamondCut.length; facetIndex++) {\n            IDiamondCut.FacetCutAction action = _diamondCut[facetIndex].action;\n            if (action == IDiamondCut.FacetCutAction.Add) {\n                addFunctions(_diamondCut[facetIndex].facetAddress, _diamondCut[facetIndex].functionSelectors);\n            } else if (action == IDiamondCut.FacetCutAction.Replace) {\n                replaceFunctions(_diamondCut[facetIndex].facetAddress, _diamondCut[facetIndex].functionSelectors);\n            } else if (action == IDiamondCut.FacetCutAction.Remove) {\n                removeFunctions(_diamondCut[facetIndex].facetAddress, _diamondCut[facetIndex].functionSelectors);\n            } else {\n                revert(\"DiamondStorageLibCut: Incorrect FacetCutAction\");\n            }\n        }\n        emit DiamondCut(_diamondCut, _init, _calldata);\n        initializeDiamondCut(_init, _calldata);\n    }\n\n    function addFunctions(address _facetAddress, bytes4[] memory _functionSelectors) internal {\n        require(_functionSelectors.length > 0, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: No selectors in facet to cut\");\n        DiamondStorage storage ds = diamondStorage();\n        require(_facetAddress != address(0), \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Add facet can't be address(0)\");\n        uint96 selectorPosition = uint96(ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors.length);\n        // add new facet address if it does not exist\n        if (selectorPosition == 0) {\n            addFacet(ds, _facetAddress);\n        }\n        for (uint256 selectorIndex; selectorIndex < _functionSelectors.length; selectorIndex++) {\n            bytes4 selector = _functionSelectors[selectorIndex];\n            address oldFacetAddress = ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[selector].facetAddress;\n            require(oldFacetAddress == address(0), \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Can't add function that already exists\");\n            addFunction(ds, selector, selectorPosition, _facetAddress);\n            selectorPosition++;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function replaceFunctions(address _facetAddress, bytes4[] memory _functionSelectors) internal {\n        require(_functionSelectors.length > 0, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: No selectors in facet to cut\");\n        DiamondStorage storage ds = diamondStorage();\n        require(_facetAddress != address(0), \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Add facet can't be address(0)\");\n        uint96 selectorPosition = uint96(ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors.length);\n        // add new facet address if it does not exist\n        if (selectorPosition == 0) {\n            addFacet(ds, _facetAddress);\n        }\n        for (uint256 selectorIndex; selectorIndex < _functionSelectors.length; selectorIndex++) {\n            bytes4 selector = _functionSelectors[selectorIndex];\n            address oldFacetAddress = ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[selector].facetAddress;\n            require(oldFacetAddress != _facetAddress, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Can't replace function with same function\");\n            removeFunction(ds, oldFacetAddress, selector);\n            addFunction(ds, selector, selectorPosition, _facetAddress);\n            selectorPosition++;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function removeFunctions(address _facetAddress, bytes4[] memory _functionSelectors) internal {\n        require(_functionSelectors.length > 0, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: No selectors in facet to cut\");\n        DiamondStorage storage ds = diamondStorage();\n        // if function does not exist then do nothing and return\n        require(_facetAddress == address(0), \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Remove facet address must be address(0)\");\n        for (uint256 selectorIndex; selectorIndex < _functionSelectors.length; selectorIndex++) {\n            bytes4 selector = _functionSelectors[selectorIndex];\n            address oldFacetAddress = ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[selector].facetAddress;\n            removeFunction(ds, oldFacetAddress, selector);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function addFacet(DiamondStorage storage ds, address _facetAddress) internal {\n        enforceHasContractCode(_facetAddress, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: New facet has no code\");\n        ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].facetAddressPosition = ds.facetAddresses.length;\n        ds.facetAddresses.push(_facetAddress);\n    }\n\n\n    function addFunction(DiamondStorage storage ds, bytes4 _selector, uint96 _selectorPosition, address _facetAddress) internal {\n        ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[_selector].functionSelectorPosition = _selectorPosition;\n        ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors.push(_selector);\n        ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[_selector].facetAddress = _facetAddress;\n    }\n\n    function removeFunction(DiamondStorage storage ds, address _facetAddress, bytes4 _selector) internal {\n        require(_facetAddress != address(0), \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Can't remove function that doesn't exist\");\n        // an immutable function is a function defined directly in a diamond\n        require(_facetAddress != address(this), \"DiamondStorageLibCut: Can't remove immutable function\");\n        // replace selector with last selector, then delete last selector\n        uint256 selectorPosition = ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[_selector].functionSelectorPosition;\n        uint256 lastSelectorPosition = ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors.length - 1;\n        // if not the same then replace _selector with lastSelector\n        if (selectorPosition != lastSelectorPosition) {\n            bytes4 lastSelector = ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors[lastSelectorPosition];\n            ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors[selectorPosition] = lastSelector;\n            ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[lastSelector].functionSelectorPosition = uint96(selectorPosition);\n        }\n        // delete the last selector\n        ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].functionSelectors.pop();\n        delete ds.selectorToFacetAndPosition[_selector];\n\n        // if no more selectors for facet address then delete the facet address\n        if (lastSelectorPosition == 0) {\n            // replace facet address with last facet address and delete last facet address\n            uint256 lastFacetAddressPosition = ds.facetAddresses.length - 1;\n            uint256 facetAddressPosition = ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].facetAddressPosition;\n            if (facetAddressPosition != lastFacetAddressPosition) {\n                address lastFacetAddress = ds.facetAddresses[lastFacetAddressPosition];\n                ds.facetAddresses[facetAddressPosition] = lastFacetAddress;\n                ds.facetFunctionSelectors[lastFacetAddress].facetAddressPosition = facetAddressPosition;\n            }\n            ds.facetAddresses.pop();\n            delete ds.facetFunctionSelectors[_facetAddress].facetAddressPosition;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function initializeDiamondCut(address _init, bytes memory _calldata) internal {\n        if (_init == address(0)) {\n            require(_calldata.length == 0, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: _init is address(0) but_calldata is not empty\");\n        } else {\n            require(_calldata.length > 0, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: _calldata is empty but _init is not address(0)\");\n            if (_init != address(this)) {\n                enforceHasContractCode(_init, \"DiamondStorageLibCut: _init address has no code\");\n            }\n            (bool success, bytes memory error) = _init.delegatecall(_calldata);\n            if (!success) {\n                if (error.length > 0) {\n                    // bubble up the error\n                    revert(string(error));\n                } else {\n                    revert(\"DiamondStorageLibCut: _init function reverted\");\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    function enforceHasContractCode(address _contract, string memory _errorMessage) internal view {\n        uint256 contractSize;\n        assembly {\n            contractSize := extcodesize(_contract)\n        }\n        require(contractSize > 0, _errorMessage);\n    }\n\n    event OwnedAssetAdded(bytes32 indexed asset, uint256 timestamp);\n\n    event OwnedAssetRemoved(bytes32 indexed asset, uint256 timestamp);\n}","keccak256":"0xa2494934d534010b2b62b0fbde24815cf467c537d91c02cb81ee7e439f7a33a2","license":"MIT"},"contracts/lib/GmxBenchmarkMath.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/IERC20Metadata.sol\";\nimport {DiamondStorageLib} from \"./DiamondStorageLib.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title GmxBenchmarkMath\n * @notice External (DELEGATECALL-target) library holding the shared GMX V2 benchmark math:\n *         the premium-scaled pro-rata of a GM-token amount into its underlying long/short\n *         token amounts, and the deductible performance fee for a position.\n *\n *         The premium-scaled pro-rata makes the funded-delta contribution to a benchmark\n *         satisfy the same `longAmt * longPrice + shortAmt * shortPrice == amount * gmPrice`\n *         invariant that the full-balance variant in\n *         `GmxV2FeesHelper._getUnderlyingTokenDetails` maintains. Without it, an additive\n *         benchmark update under-counts the funded position's cost basis by the GM premium\n *         ratio, leaving a residual that gets charged as fee again on the next sweep.\n *\n * @dev    Lives in a separate deployed library rather than an inlined `internal` function\n *         because inlining the arithmetic pushes the AssetsOperations facets past the\n *         24 KB code-size limit. All external reads (`balanceOf`, `totalSupply`,\n *         `decimals`) are performed inside the library so they don't bloat each consuming\n *         facet. Called via DELEGATECALL, which preserves the calling facet's storage and\n *         msg.sender context.\n */\nlibrary GmxBenchmarkMath {\n    /**\n     * @notice Premium-scaled pro-rata of `gmTokenAmount` GM tokens in `gmMarket` into the\n     *         underlying long/short token amounts that the benchmark should store.\n     *\n     * @param gmMarket          The GM market token address\n     * @param gmTokenAmount     The GM-token amount whose pro-rata we want (e.g. the funded\n     *                          delta on a fund() call, or the PA's full balance on a sweep)\n     * @param longToken         Underlying long token address\n     * @param shortToken        Underlying short token address (caller passes the SAME address\n     *                          as longToken for Plus markets; the `isPlusMarket` flag zeroes\n     *                          the short side)\n     * @param gmTokenPrice      In 1e8 USD precision\n     * @param longTokenPrice    In 1e8 USD precision\n     * @param shortTokenPrice   In 1e8 USD precision (ignored for Plus markets)\n     * @param isPlusMarket      If true, returns 0 for shortTokenAmount and excludes the short\n     *                          side from the ratio denominator (mirrors the Plus-market\n     *                          handling in `_getUnderlyingTokenDetails`)\n     */\n    function premiumScaledUnderlying(\n        address gmMarket,\n        uint256 gmTokenAmount,\n        address longToken,\n        address shortToken,\n        uint256 gmTokenPrice,\n        uint256 longTokenPrice,\n        uint256 shortTokenPrice,\n        bool isPlusMarket\n    ) public view returns (uint256 longTokenAmount, uint256 shortTokenAmount) {\n        uint256 totalGmSupply = IERC20Metadata(gmMarket).totalSupply();\n        uint256 totalLongTokens = IERC20Metadata(longToken).balanceOf(gmMarket);\n        uint256 totalShortTokens = isPlusMarket\n            ? 0\n            : IERC20Metadata(shortToken).balanceOf(gmMarket);\n\n        // ratio = totalGmWorth / totalUnderlyingWorth, computed as one block to keep the\n        // local-variable count low enough that solc-without-IR doesn't hit stack-too-deep.\n        uint256 ratio;\n        {\n            uint256 totalUnderlyingWorth =\n                totalLongTokens  * longTokenPrice  / 1e8 * 1e18 / 10 ** IERC20Metadata(longToken).decimals()\n              + totalShortTokens * shortTokenPrice / 1e8 * 1e18 / 10 ** IERC20Metadata(shortToken).decimals();\n            ratio = ((totalGmSupply * gmTokenPrice / 1e8) * 1e18) / totalUnderlyingWorth;\n        }\n\n        longTokenAmount  = (ratio * gmTokenAmount * totalLongTokens)  / (1e18 * totalGmSupply);\n        shortTokenAmount = (ratio * gmTokenAmount * totalShortTokens) / (1e18 * totalGmSupply);\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Fee fraction applied to unrealized GM-token performance. 1e17 of 1e18 = 10%.\n    uint256 private constant FEE_PERCENTAGE = 1e17;\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Computes the GMX V2 performance fee owed on a position, denominated in GM\n     *         tokens. Single source of truth shared by:\n     *           - `GmxV2FeesHelper._getDeductibleFeesInGmTokens` (the on-chain fee-sweep\n     *             view, also used by SmartLoanViewFacet's net-of-fee balance helpers); and\n     *           - `SolvencyFacetProd._getSolvencyBalance` (the solvency-side deduction of\n     *             unrealized fee from collateral).\n     *         Both call sites delegating here keeps the fee-sweep accounting and the\n     *         solvency-side accounting from drifting apart.\n     *\n     * @dev    Reads the benchmark and the calling facet's GM-token balance from storage\n     *         directly. Callers must pass the prices they want the fee evaluated against\n     *         (those vary per call site: solvency uses prices fetched via the dual-oracle\n     *         router; view callers may use spot prices).\n     *\n     * @param gmMarket          The GM/GLV market token whose position the fee is computed for\n     * @param gmTokenPrice      1e8 USD precision\n     * @param longTokenPrice    1e8 USD precision\n     * @param shortTokenPrice   1e8 USD precision (caller passes 0 for Plus-markets)\n     * @return feeInGmTokens    The 10%-of-unrealized-performance fee, denominated in GM tokens\n     */\n    function deductibleFeeInGmTokens(\n        address gmMarket,\n        uint256 gmTokenPrice,\n        uint256 longTokenPrice,\n        uint256 shortTokenPrice\n    ) public view returns (uint256 feeInGmTokens) {\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark =\n            DiamondStorageLib.getGmxPositionBenchmark(gmMarket);\n        if (!benchmark.exists || gmTokenPrice == 0) return 0;\n\n        uint256 currentBalance = IERC20Metadata(gmMarket).balanceOf(address(this));\n        uint256 currentValueUsd = (currentBalance * gmTokenPrice) / 1e8;\n        uint256 totalUnderlyingValueUsd =\n            _underlyingValueUsd(benchmark.underlyingLongTokenAmount,  longTokenPrice,  benchmark.longTokenAddress)\n          + _underlyingValueUsd(benchmark.underlyingShortTokenAmount, shortTokenPrice, benchmark.shortTokenAddress);\n\n        if (currentValueUsd <= totalUnderlyingValueUsd) return 0;\n        uint256 gmPerformanceUsd = currentValueUsd - totalUnderlyingValueUsd;\n        // `gmPerformanceUsd / 10` is the bytecode-cheap equivalent of\n        // `(gmPerformanceUsd * FEE_PERCENTAGE) / 1e18` while FEE_PERCENTAGE == 1e17.\n        feeInGmTokens = ((gmPerformanceUsd / 10) * 1e8) / gmTokenPrice;\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Convert (tokenAmount in token's native decimals \u00d7 priceUsd in 1e8) \u2192 USD in 1e18.\n    ///      Mirrors the decimal handling in `GmxV2FeesHelper._calculateTokenValueUsd`.\n    function _underlyingValueUsd(uint256 amount, uint256 priceUsd, address tokenAddr) private view returns (uint256) {\n        if (amount == 0 || priceUsd == 0 || tokenAddr == address(0)) return 0;\n        uint8 decimals = IERC20Metadata(tokenAddr).decimals();\n        // The decimals == 18 case collapses into the <= 18 branch via 10**0 == 1.\n        if (decimals <= 18) return (amount * priceUsd * (10 ** (18 - decimals))) / 1e8;\n        return (amount * priceUsd) / (1e8 * (10 ** (decimals - 18)));\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x871a898f15526ca3188cd7af8b4a8dae7a263879c11f7df4f318ce896c90a4d1","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/GmxGlvUnifiedHelper.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\ncontract GmxGlvUnifiedHelper {\n\n    // ============ ERRORS ============\n    error InvalidGlvToken();\n    error InvalidTargetMarket();\n    error ZeroDepositAmount();\n    error ZeroWithdrawalAmount();\n    error GlvTokenNotWhitelisted();\n    error GlvTokenNotFound();\n    error WrongDepositToken();\n    error DepositTokenInactive();\n\n    error InsufficientBalanceAfterFees();\n    error InsufficientBalance();\n    error InvalidMinOutputValue();\n    error ActionMayCauseInsolvency();\n    error GmxPlusMarketTokenNotFound();\n    error GmxMarketTokensNotFound();\n    error InvalidExecutionFee();\n    error MarketNotWhitelisted();\n\n\n// Unified struct that works for both regular and Plus markets\n    struct UnifiedGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses {\n        uint256 gmTokenPrice;\n        uint256 longTokenPrice;\n        uint256 shortTokenPrice; // Always 0 for Plus markets\n        address longToken;\n        address shortToken; // Same as longToken for Plus markets\n        bool isPlusMarket;\n    }\n\n    ///@notice GmxTokenPrices struct containing current prices of GM, long, and short tokens in USD (1e8 format)\n    struct GmxTokenPrices {\n        uint256 gmTokenPrice;\n        uint256 longTokenPrice;\n        uint256 shortTokenPrice;\n    }\n}","keccak256":"0x7df3dd2f60b25bc34bfc095a8d064ddfa2abeeaf3ea8ee110fae4fbaea6fa324","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/GmxV2FeesHelper.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\nimport \"./arbitrum/DeploymentConstants.sol\";\nimport \"./DiamondStorageLib.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/ITokenManager.sol\";\nimport {IGmxReader} from \"../interfaces/gmx-v2/IGmxReader.sol\";\nimport \"./DiamondMethodsAccess.sol\";\nimport {GmxGlvUnifiedHelper} from \"./GmxGlvUnifiedHelper.sol\";\nimport {GmxBenchmarkMath} from \"./GmxBenchmarkMath.sol\";\n\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/IERC20Metadata.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/gmx-v2/EventUtils.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/gmx-v2/IDepositUtils.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/gmx-v2/IWithdrawalUtils.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/gmx-v2/IGmxV2Router.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/gmx-v2/BasicMulticall.sol\";\n\nabstract contract GmxV2FeesHelper is DiamondMethodsAccess, GmxGlvUnifiedHelper {\n\n    /// @dev 10% performance fee (1e17 of 1e18). The shared fee math lives in\n    /// `GmxBenchmarkMath.deductibleFeeInGmTokens`; this constant is still read by\n    /// `_processFeeCollection` / `_getGmAnnualisedPerformance`, which apply the same\n    /// percentage to their own perf-USD calculations.\n    uint256 public constant FEE_PERCENTAGE = 1e17;\n\n    \n\n\n    struct GmxPositionDetails {\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd; // in 1e8 format\n        uint256 underlyingLongTokenAmount; // in longTokenDecimals format\n        uint256 underlyingShortTokenAmount; // in shortTokenDecimals format\n        uint256 longTokenPriceUsd; // in 1e8 format\n        uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd; // in 1e8 format\n        uint256 benchmarkTimeStamp; // timestamp of when the benchmark was set\n        address longTokenAddress;\n        address shortTokenAddress;\n    }\n\n    \n\n    struct FeeCalculationData {\n        uint256 currentBalance;\n        uint256 currentValueUsd;\n        uint256 longTokenValueUsd;\n        uint256 shortTokenValueUsd;\n        uint256 gmPerformanceUsd;\n    }\n\n    struct TokenSupplyData {\n        uint256 totalGmSupply;\n        uint256 totalLongTokens;\n        uint256 totalShortTokens;\n    }\n\n    \n\n    // EVENTS\n    event BenchmarkCreated(\n        address indexed gmMarket,\n        uint256 indexed benchmarkValueUsd,\n        uint256 longTokenAmount,\n        uint256 shortTokenAmount,\n        address longTokenAddress,\n        address shortTokenAddress,\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 longTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 timestamp\n    );\n\n    event BenchmarkUpdated(\n        address indexed gmMarket,\n        uint256 indexed newBenchmarkValueUsd,\n        uint256 newLongTokenAmount,\n        uint256 newShortTokenAmount,\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 longTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 timestamp\n    );\n\n    event FeesCollected(\n        address indexed gmMarket,\n        uint256 indexed feeInGmTokens,\n        uint256 performanceUsd,\n        uint256 currentBalance,\n        uint256 timestamp\n    );\n\n    event BenchmarkInitiated(\n        address indexed gmMarket,\n        address indexed initiator,\n        bool isPlusMarket,\n        uint256 timestamp\n    );\n\n    // Unified function that replaces both _getGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses and _getGmxPlusTokenPricesAndAddresses\n    function _getUnifiedGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses(address gmMarket) internal view returns (UnifiedGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses memory) {\n        ITokenManager tokenManager = DeploymentConstants.getTokenManager();\n        bool isPlusMarket = tokenManager.isGmxPlusMarket(gmMarket);\n        \n        address gmxReader = DeploymentConstants.getGmxReaderAddress();\n        address dataStore = DeploymentConstants.getGmxDataStoreAddress();\n        IGmxReader.MarketProps memory marketProps = IGmxReader(gmxReader).getMarket(dataStore, gmMarket);\n        \n        address longToken;\n        address shortToken;\n        \n        if (isPlusMarket) {\n            // Plus markets: both long and short are the same token\n            longToken = marketProps.longToken;\n            shortToken = longToken; // Same token for both\n            if (longToken == address(0)) revert GmxPlusMarketTokenNotFound();\n        } else {\n            // Regular GM markets: different long and short tokens\n            longToken = marketProps.longToken;\n            shortToken = marketProps.shortToken;\n            if (longToken == address(0) || shortToken == address(0)) revert GmxMarketTokensNotFound();\n        }\n        \n        // Get prices - only request unique symbols to avoid duplicate price requests for Plus markets\n        bytes32[] memory symbols;\n        if (isPlusMarket) {\n            symbols = new bytes32[](2); // Only need GM token and the single underlying token\n            symbols[0] = tokenManager.tokenAddressToSymbol(gmMarket);\n            symbols[1] = tokenManager.tokenAddressToSymbol(longToken);\n        } else {\n            symbols = new bytes32[](3); // Need GM token, long token, and short token\n            symbols[0] = tokenManager.tokenAddressToSymbol(gmMarket);\n            symbols[1] = tokenManager.tokenAddressToSymbol(longToken);\n            symbols[2] = tokenManager.tokenAddressToSymbol(shortToken);\n        }\n        \n        uint256[] memory prices = getPrices(symbols);\n        \n        return UnifiedGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses({\n            gmTokenPrice: prices[0],\n            longTokenPrice: prices[1],\n            shortTokenPrice: isPlusMarket ? 0 : prices[2], // 0 for Plus markets to avoid double counting\n            longToken: longToken,\n            shortToken: shortToken,\n            isPlusMarket: isPlusMarket\n        });\n    }\n\n\n    // Backward compatibility function that returns only prices\n    function _getGmxTokenPrices(address gmMarket) internal view returns (GmxTokenPrices memory) {\n        UnifiedGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses memory unified = _getUnifiedGmxTokenPricesAndAddresses(gmMarket);\n        return GmxTokenPrices({\n            gmTokenPrice: unified.gmTokenPrice,\n            longTokenPrice: unified.longTokenPrice,\n            shortTokenPrice: unified.shortTokenPrice\n        });\n    }\n\n    function _getUnderlyingTokenDetails(address gmMarket, GmxTokenPrices memory gmTokenPrices, address longToken, address shortToken) internal view returns (uint256 longTokenAmount, uint256 shortTokenAmount) {\n        ITokenManager tokenManager = DeploymentConstants.getTokenManager();\n\n        uint256 totalGmSupply = IERC20Metadata(gmMarket).totalSupply();\n        uint256 gmTokenAmount = IERC20Metadata(gmMarket).balanceOf(address(this));\n\n        // The GM market contract is the owner of the underlying tokens\n        uint256 totalLongTokens = IERC20Metadata(longToken).balanceOf(gmMarket);\n        uint256 totalShortTokens;\n        if(tokenManager.isGmxPlusMarket(gmMarket)) {\n            ///@dev totalShortTokens set to zero for plus markets, which snowballs into shortTokenAmount being zero.\n            ///@dev less code duplication this way: second addition in totalUnderlyingWorth calculation will also be zero\n            totalShortTokens = 0;\n        } else {\n            totalShortTokens = IERC20Metadata(shortToken).balanceOf(gmMarket);\n        }\n\n        uint256 totalGmWorth = totalGmSupply * gmTokenPrices.gmTokenPrice / 1e8;\n        uint256 totalUnderlyingWorth = totalLongTokens * gmTokenPrices.longTokenPrice / 1e8 * 1e18 / 10 ** IERC20Metadata(longToken).decimals()\n            + totalShortTokens * gmTokenPrices.shortTokenPrice / 1e8 * 1e18 / 10 ** IERC20Metadata(shortToken).decimals();\n\n        uint256 ratio = totalGmWorth * 1e18 / totalUnderlyingWorth;\n\n        // Calculate this position's pro-rata share of the underlying tokens\n        longTokenAmount = (ratio * gmTokenAmount * totalLongTokens) / (1e18 * totalGmSupply);\n        shortTokenAmount = (ratio * gmTokenAmount * totalShortTokens) / (1e18 * totalGmSupply);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Additively extend an existing benchmark with a new GM-token contribution\n     *         made through `AssetsOperationsFacet.fund()`.\n     * @dev Unlike `_createOrUpdatePositionBenchmark`, this does NOT recompute the benchmark\n     *      from the current total balance. Instead it preserves the existing cost basis and\n     *      layers on the newly-funded amount at its current market value.\n     *\n     *      Recomputing from the total balance would let a user holding a GM position with\n     *      unrealized gains call fund() with a dust amount of GM tokens and have the\n     *      benchmark rewritten to `totalBalance * currentPrice`, erasing the prior cost\n     *      basis and resetting performance fee accrual to zero.\n     *\n     * @param gmMarket  The GM market whose benchmark is being updated.\n     * @param positionDetails  Underlying token deltas attributable *only* to the newly-funded\n     *        amount, current prices, and token addresses. Underlying amounts MUST be computed\n     *        from the funded GM amount (not the total balance).\n     * @param fundedGmAmount  The GM-token amount just transferred into the PrimeAccount.\n     */\n    function _addToBenchmarkFromFunding(\n        address gmMarket,\n        GmxPositionDetails memory positionDetails,\n        uint256 fundedGmAmount\n    ) internal {\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory existing = DiamondStorageLib.getGmxPositionBenchmark(gmMarket);\n        uint256 addedValueUsd = (fundedGmAmount * positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd) / 1e8;\n\n        if (!existing.exists) {\n            // First-time benchmark creation for this market. The funded amount IS the entire\n            // position, so creating a fresh benchmark sized to that amount is correct.\n            DiamondStorageLib.setGmxPositionBenchmark(\n                DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmarkParams({\n                    market: gmMarket,\n                    benchmarkValueUsd: addedValueUsd,\n                    longTokenAmount: positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                    shortTokenAmount: positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                    longToken: positionDetails.longTokenAddress,\n                    shortToken: positionDetails.shortTokenAddress,\n                    timestamp: block.timestamp,\n                    gmTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                    longTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n                    shortTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd\n                })\n            );\n            emit BenchmarkCreated(\n                gmMarket,\n                addedValueUsd,\n                positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                positionDetails.longTokenAddress,\n                positionDetails.shortTokenAddress,\n                positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n                positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd,\n                block.timestamp\n            );\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Preserve existing cost basis. Total benchmark = prior benchmark + funded delta at current price.\n        DiamondStorageLib.setGmxPositionBenchmark(\n            DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmarkParams({\n                market: gmMarket,\n                benchmarkValueUsd: existing.benchmarkValueUsd + addedValueUsd,\n                longTokenAmount: existing.underlyingLongTokenAmount + positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                shortTokenAmount: existing.underlyingShortTokenAmount + positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                longToken: positionDetails.longTokenAddress,\n                shortToken: positionDetails.shortTokenAddress,\n                timestamp: block.timestamp,\n                gmTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                longTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n                shortTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd\n            })\n        );\n        emit BenchmarkUpdated(\n            gmMarket,\n            existing.benchmarkValueUsd + addedValueUsd,\n            existing.underlyingLongTokenAmount + positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n            existing.underlyingShortTokenAmount + positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n            positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n            positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n            positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd,\n            block.timestamp\n        );\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Overwrites the benchmark for `gmMarket` to the PA's current balance valued at\n     *         the supplied prices. Used by:\n     *           - `GmxV2Facet._updatePositionBenchmark` / `GmxV2PlusFacet._updatePositionBenchmark`\n     *             (standalone sweepFeesAndUpdateBenchMark* paths + GMX\n     *             afterDepositExecution/afterWithdrawalExecution keeper callbacks);\n     *           - `GlvFacet._updateGlvPositionBenchmark` (GLV equivalent);\n     *           - `_updateBenchmark` (WithdrawalIntentFacet post-execution path).\n     *\n     * @dev    Overwrite semantics are safe on these paths \u2014 they cannot be used to reset a\n     *         benchmark to current price and bypass the fee \u2014 because of the ordering of\n     *         `_deposit` / `_withdraw`:\n     *           1. The entrypoint calls `_sweepFees(...)` BEFORE the `BasicMulticall` that\n     *              triggers GMX execution.\n     *           2. The GMX router accepts the request; the GMX keeper executes it some\n     *              blocks later.\n     *           3. The keeper-triggered `afterDepositExecution` / `afterWithdrawalExecution`\n     *              callback fires and overwrites the benchmark here.\n     *         The fee is already swept in step 1, before the overwrite in step 3. Same\n     *         shape for GmxV2Plus and Glv. The additive (non-overwrite) update is only\n     *         needed on the `fund()` path, which has no preceding sweep.\n     */\n    function _createOrUpdatePositionBenchmark(address gmMarket, GmxPositionDetails memory positionDetails) internal {\n        uint256 currentBalance = IERC20(gmMarket).balanceOf(address(this));\n        uint256 benchmarkValueUsd = (currentBalance * positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd) / 1e8;\n\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory existingBenchmark = DiamondStorageLib.getGmxPositionBenchmark(gmMarket);\n        bool isCreation = !existingBenchmark.exists;\n        \n        DiamondStorageLib.setGmxPositionBenchmark(\n            DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmarkParams({\n                market: gmMarket,\n                benchmarkValueUsd: benchmarkValueUsd,\n                longTokenAmount: positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                shortTokenAmount: positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                longToken: positionDetails.longTokenAddress,\n                shortToken: positionDetails.shortTokenAddress,\n                timestamp: block.timestamp,\n                gmTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                longTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n                shortTokenPriceUsd: positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd\n            })\n        );\n\n        if (isCreation) {\n            emit BenchmarkCreated(\n                gmMarket,\n                benchmarkValueUsd,\n                positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                positionDetails.longTokenAddress,\n                positionDetails.shortTokenAddress,\n                positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n                positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd,\n                block.timestamp\n            );\n        } else {\n            emit BenchmarkUpdated(\n                gmMarket,\n                benchmarkValueUsd,\n                positionDetails.underlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                positionDetails.underlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                positionDetails.gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                positionDetails.longTokenPriceUsd,\n                positionDetails.shortTokenPriceUsd,\n                block.timestamp\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    function _updateBenchmark(\n        address gmMarket,\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 longTokenPrice,\n        uint256 shortTokenPrice\n    ) internal {\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark = DiamondStorageLib.getGmxPositionBenchmark(gmMarket);\n\n        // Check for zero supply to avoid division by zero\n        if (IERC20(gmMarket).totalSupply() == 0) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        uint256 currentBalance = IERC20(gmMarket).balanceOf(address(this));\n        uint256 benchmarkValueUsd = (currentBalance * gmTokenPriceUsd) / 1e8; // currentBalance in 1e18 format\n\n        // Use the premium-scaled pro-rata formula (`_getUnderlyingTokenDetails`) so the\n        // benchmark matches the invariant `underlyingAmt * underlyingPrice ==\n        // currentBalance * gmPrice` \u2014 the same form `_updatePositionBenchmark` and\n        // `_updateGlvPositionBenchmark` already use. A strict pro-rata would leave\n        // `performance > 0` immediately after this runs, so the next sweep would re-charge\n        // a fee on the GM premium. Only caller is\n        // `WithdrawalIntentFacet.executeWithdrawalIntent` (GMX markets only).\n        (uint256 newUnderlyingLongTokenAmount, uint256 newUnderlyingShortTokenAmount) =\n            _getUnderlyingTokenDetails(\n                gmMarket,\n                GmxTokenPrices({\n                    gmTokenPrice: gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                    longTokenPrice: longTokenPrice,\n                    shortTokenPrice: shortTokenPrice\n                }),\n                benchmark.longTokenAddress,\n                benchmark.shortTokenAddress\n            );\n\n        DiamondStorageLib.setGmxPositionBenchmark(\n            DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmarkParams({\n                market: gmMarket,\n                benchmarkValueUsd: benchmarkValueUsd,\n                longTokenAmount: newUnderlyingLongTokenAmount,\n                shortTokenAmount: newUnderlyingShortTokenAmount,\n                longToken: benchmark.longTokenAddress,\n                shortToken: benchmark.shortTokenAddress,\n                timestamp: block.timestamp,\n                gmTokenPriceUsd: gmTokenPriceUsd,\n                longTokenPriceUsd: longTokenPrice,\n                shortTokenPriceUsd: shortTokenPrice\n            })\n        );\n\n        emit BenchmarkUpdated(\n            gmMarket,\n            benchmarkValueUsd,\n            newUnderlyingLongTokenAmount,\n            newUnderlyingShortTokenAmount,\n            gmTokenPriceUsd,\n            longTokenPrice,\n            shortTokenPrice,\n            block.timestamp\n        );\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Sweeps accumulated fees from GM token position and transfers them to treasury\n     * @param gmMarket The GM market address\n     * @param tokenPrices GmxTokenPrices struct containing current prices of GM, long, and short tokens in USD (1e8 format)\n     \n     * @return feeInGmTokens The amount of GM tokens collected as fees\n     */\n    function _sweepFees(\n        address gmMarket, \n        GmxTokenPrices memory tokenPrices\n    ) internal returns (uint256 feeInGmTokens) {\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark = DiamondStorageLib.getGmxPositionBenchmark(gmMarket);\n        \n        if (!benchmark.exists) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n\n        if (tokenPrices.gmTokenPrice == 0 || tokenPrices.longTokenPrice == 0) { ///@dev shortTokenPrice can be 0 for GMX Plus markets\n            return 0; \n        }\n        \n        FeeCalculationData memory feeData = _calculateFeeData(\n            gmMarket, \n            tokenPrices.gmTokenPrice, \n            tokenPrices.longTokenPrice, \n            tokenPrices.shortTokenPrice, \n            benchmark\n        );\n        \n        if (feeData.currentValueUsd > feeData.longTokenValueUsd + feeData.shortTokenValueUsd) {\n            feeInGmTokens = _processFeeCollection(gmMarket, tokenPrices.gmTokenPrice, feeData, benchmark);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function _getGmAnnualisedPerformance(address gmMarket, uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd, uint256 longTokenPriceUsd, uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd) internal view returns (uint256 gmAnnualPerformance) {\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark = DiamondStorageLib.getGmxPositionBenchmark(gmMarket);\n\n        if (!benchmark.exists || benchmark.benchmarkTimeStamp == 0 || block.timestamp <= benchmark.benchmarkTimeStamp) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n\n        // Current balance and its USD value\n        uint256 currentBalance = IERC20(gmMarket).balanceOf(address(this));\n        uint256 currentValueUsd = (currentBalance * gmTokenPriceUsd) / 1e8;\n\n        // Calculate USD values with proper decimal handling\n        uint256 longTokenValueUsd = _calculateTokenValueUsd(\n            benchmark.underlyingLongTokenAmount, \n            longTokenPriceUsd, \n            benchmark.longTokenAddress\n        );\n        uint256 shortTokenValueUsd = _calculateTokenValueUsd(\n            benchmark.underlyingShortTokenAmount, \n            shortTokenPriceUsd, \n            benchmark.shortTokenAddress\n        );\n\n        uint256 totalUnderlyingValueUsd = longTokenValueUsd + shortTokenValueUsd;\n\n        // Check for negative performance (no underflow)\n        if (currentValueUsd <= totalUnderlyingValueUsd) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n\n        uint256 gmPerformanceUsd = currentValueUsd - totalUnderlyingValueUsd;\n        uint256 timeElapsed = block.timestamp - benchmark.benchmarkTimeStamp;\n\n        // Avoid division precision loss by scaling up first\n        // Annual performance = (performance * 365 days) / timeElapsed\n        // Annual performance %, scaled to 1e18 = (performance * 1e18 * 365 days) / timeElapsed / currentValue\n        gmAnnualPerformance = (gmPerformanceUsd * 1e18 * 365 days) / timeElapsed / currentValueUsd;\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Returns the deductible GMX V2 performance fee for the calling facet's GM\n    ///         position, denominated in GM tokens. Delegates to `GmxBenchmarkMath` so this\n    ///         entrypoint and `SolvencyFacetProd`'s solvency-side fee deduction share a\n    ///         single source of truth.\n    function _getDeductibleFeesInGmTokens(address gmMarket, uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd, uint256 longTokenPriceUsd, uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd) internal view returns (uint256 feeInGmTokens) {\n        feeInGmTokens = GmxBenchmarkMath.deductibleFeeInGmTokens(\n            gmMarket,\n            gmTokenPriceUsd,\n            longTokenPriceUsd,\n            shortTokenPriceUsd\n        );\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Calculate token value in USD with proper decimal handling\n     * @param tokenAmount The token amount (with original token decimals)\n     * @param tokenPriceUsd The token price in USD (1e8 format)\n     * @param tokenAddress The token contract address\n     * @return valueUsd The USD value with 18 decimals\n     */\n    function _calculateTokenValueUsd(\n        uint256 tokenAmount, \n        uint256 tokenPriceUsd, \n        address tokenAddress\n    ) private view returns (uint256 valueUsd) {\n        if (tokenAmount == 0 || tokenPriceUsd == 0) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n\n        uint8 decimals = IERC20Metadata(tokenAddress).decimals();\n        \n        // tokenAmount is stored in native token decimals, but USD calculations \n        // work with 18 decimals, so we need to normalize to 18 decimals\n        if (decimals != 18) {\n            if (decimals < 18) {\n                // Scale UP for tokens with fewer decimals\n                tokenAmount = tokenAmount * (10 ** (18 - decimals));\n            } else {\n                // Scale DOWN for tokens with more decimals\n                tokenAmount = tokenAmount / (10 ** (decimals - 18));\n            }\n        }\n\n        valueUsd = (tokenAmount * tokenPriceUsd) / 1e8;\n    }\n\n    function _calculateFeeData(\n        address gmMarket,\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 longTokenPriceUsd,\n        uint256 shortTokenPriceUsd,\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark\n    ) private view returns (FeeCalculationData memory feeData) {\n        ITokenManager tokenManager = DeploymentConstants.getTokenManager();\n        \n        feeData.currentBalance = IERC20(gmMarket).balanceOf(address(this));\n        feeData.currentValueUsd = (feeData.currentBalance * gmTokenPriceUsd) / 1e8;\n        \n        // Calculate USD values with proper decimal handling\n        feeData.longTokenValueUsd = _calculateTokenValueUsd(\n            benchmark.underlyingLongTokenAmount, \n            longTokenPriceUsd, \n            benchmark.longTokenAddress\n        );\n        feeData.shortTokenValueUsd = _calculateTokenValueUsd(\n            benchmark.underlyingShortTokenAmount, \n            shortTokenPriceUsd, \n            benchmark.shortTokenAddress\n        );\n        \n        uint256 totalUnderlyingValueUsd = feeData.longTokenValueUsd + feeData.shortTokenValueUsd;\n\n        // Check for negative performance (no underflow)\n        if (feeData.currentValueUsd > totalUnderlyingValueUsd) {\n            feeData.gmPerformanceUsd = feeData.currentValueUsd - totalUnderlyingValueUsd;\n        } else {\n            feeData.gmPerformanceUsd = 0;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function _processFeeCollection(\n        address gmMarket,\n        uint256 gmTokenPriceUsd,\n        FeeCalculationData memory feeData,\n        DiamondStorageLib.GmxPositionBenchmark memory benchmark\n    ) private returns (uint256 feeInGmTokens) {\n        uint256 gmPerformanceFeeUsd = (feeData.gmPerformanceUsd * FEE_PERCENTAGE) / 1e18;\n\n        if (gmPerformanceFeeUsd == 0) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n\n        feeInGmTokens = (gmPerformanceFeeUsd * 1e8) / gmTokenPriceUsd;\n\n        // Only process fees if amount is >= 3 wei (to allow proper 1/3, 2/3 split)\n        if (feeInGmTokens >= 3 && feeInGmTokens <= feeData.currentBalance) {\n            uint256 stabilityPoolFee = feeInGmTokens / 3;\n            uint256 treasuryFee = feeInGmTokens - stabilityPoolFee;\n\n            IERC20(gmMarket).transfer(DeploymentConstants.getStabilityPoolAddress(), stabilityPoolFee);\n            IERC20(gmMarket).transfer(DeploymentConstants.getTreasuryAddress(), treasuryFee);\n\n            emit FeesCollected(\n                gmMarket,\n                feeInGmTokens,\n                feeData.gmPerformanceUsd,\n                feeData.currentBalance,\n                block.timestamp\n            );\n\n            // The benchmark must be scaled proportionally to the GM tokens just swept out,\n            // otherwise the next fee calc reports the same gain and charges the fee again.\n            // Every `_sweepFees` caller EXCEPT `AssetsOperationsFacet.fund()` immediately\n            // overwrites the benchmark (`_updatePositionBenchmark` /\n            // `_updateGlvPositionBenchmark` / GMX callback), making in-place scaling here a\n            // no-op for them. The additive fund() flow is the only one that doesn't\n            // overwrite, so it performs the scaling itself after `_sweepFees` returns \u2014\n            // kept out of this private function to keep inheritors under the 24 KB limit.\n        } else {\n            // If feeInGmTokens < 3, we can't split properly, so return 0\n            feeInGmTokens = 0;\n        }\n    }\n}","keccak256":"0x4763371e85502b76070f7540b721cb51e56bf1dfa01c2fe374bfeb63335c5c9c","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/LeverageTierLib.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\nimport \"./arbitrum/DeploymentConstants.sol\";\nimport \"./DiamondStorageLib.sol\";\nimport \"../interfaces/ITokenManager.sol\";\n\n\n/**\n * @title LeverageTierLib\n * @dev Library for managing different leverage tier operations, with prime debt calculations\n */\nlibrary LeverageTierLib {\n    \n    enum LeverageTier { BASIC, PREMIUM, _NON_EXISTENT }\n\n    /// @dev Updates the PRIME debt snapshot based on the total borrowed value\n    /// @param totalBorrowedValue The total borrowed value in USD\n    /// @dev totalBorrowedValue is fetched via _getDebt(), use with caution\n    function updatePrimeDebtSnapshot(uint256 totalBorrowedValue) internal {\n       \n        \n        // Calculate current total Prime Debt (recorded + accrued)\n        uint256 currentPrimeDebt = getCurrentPrimeDebt(totalBorrowedValue);\n\n        DiamondStorageLib.setPrimeDebt(currentPrimeDebt);\n\n        DiamondStorageLib.setLastPrimeDebtUpdate(block.timestamp);\n        \n    }\n\n    /// @dev Gets the current Prime Debt based on the total borrowed value\n    /// @param totalBorrowedValue The total borrowed value in USD\n    /// @return The current Prime Debt amount\n    function getCurrentPrimeDebt(uint256 totalBorrowedValue) internal view returns (uint256) {\n        ITokenManager tokenManager = DeploymentConstants.getTokenManager();\n        \n        // Get the last recorded Prime Debt snapshot\n        uint256 recordedPrimeDebt = DiamondStorageLib.getPrimeDebt();\n        \n        // Calculate time elapsed since last snapshot\n        uint256 timeElapsed = block.timestamp - DiamondStorageLib.getLastPrimeDebtUpdate();\n        \n        // Get current total borrowed value (in USD)\n        // uint256 totalBorrowedValue = _getDebt();\n        \n        // Get the Prime Debt ratio (e.g., 2 PRIME per 100 USD borrowed per year)\n        uint256 primeDebtRatio = tokenManager.tieredPrimeDebtRatio(DiamondStorageLib.getPrimeLeverageTier());\n        \n        // Calculate accrued Prime Debt since last snapshot\n        /// @dev accrued Prime Debt is calculated as:\n        /// (totalBorrowedValue * primeDebtRatio * timeElapsed) / (100 * 365 days)\n        /// where: primeDebtRatio is expressed in 18 decimal precision, explicitly divided by 100 for clarity on ratio being per 100 USD borrowed\n        /// and timeElapsed is in seconds, so we divide by 365 days to get annual debt accrual\n        uint256 accruedPrimeDebt = (totalBorrowedValue * primeDebtRatio * timeElapsed) / (100 * 365 days* 10 ** 18);\n        \n        // Return total Prime Debt (recorded + accrued)\n        return recordedPrimeDebt + accruedPrimeDebt;\n    }\n\n\n    /// @dev validates whether the loan has enough PRIME staked for the current leverage tier, stakes or unstakes accordingly\n    /// @param _maxBorrowableValue The maximum value that can be borrowed\n    /// @param primeAvailableBalance The available balance of PRIME tokens\n    /// @dev primeAvailableBalance is fetched in AssetsOperationsFacet and passed in as a parameter in this library function\n    /// @dev warning: primeAvailableBalance should always be == _getAvailableBalance(\"PRIME\") \n    function validateAndUpdateStakedPrime(uint256 _maxBorrowableValue, uint256 primeAvailableBalance) internal {\n        ITokenManager tokenManager = DeploymentConstants.getTokenManager();\n        address primeTokenAddress = tokenManager.getAssetAddress(\"PRIME\", true);\n        uint256 primeStakingRatio = tokenManager.tieredPrimeStakingRatio(DiamondStorageLib.getPrimeLeverageTier());\n        uint256 requiredPrimeStakeAmount = _maxBorrowableValue * primeStakingRatio / (100 * 10 **18);\n        uint256 stakedPrimeAmount = DiamondStorageLib.getStakedTokenAmount(primeTokenAddress);\n        if (stakedPrimeAmount == requiredPrimeStakeAmount) return;\n    \n        stakedPrimeAmount < requiredPrimeStakeAmount \n            ? stakePrime(primeTokenAddress, requiredPrimeStakeAmount - stakedPrimeAmount, primeAvailableBalance)\n            : unstakePrime(primeTokenAddress, stakedPrimeAmount - requiredPrimeStakeAmount);\n    \n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Stakes additional PRIME tokens (without changing tier)\n     * @param primeTokenAddress Address of the PRIME token contract\n     * @param amount Amount of PRIME to stake\n     */\n    function stakePrime(address primeTokenAddress, uint256 amount, uint256 primeAvailableBalance) internal {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n        \n        require(primeAvailableBalance >= amount, \"Insufficient PRIME balance\");\n\n        uint256 currentStaked = DiamondStorageLib.getStakedTokenAmount(primeTokenAddress);\n        \n        DiamondStorageLib.addStakedTokenAmount(primeTokenAddress,amount);\n        \n        emit PrimeStaked(msg.sender, amount, currentStaked + amount, block.timestamp);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Unstakes PRIME tokens (if requirements are still met)\n     * @param primeTokenAddress Address of the PRIME token contract\n     * @param amount Amount of PRIME to unstake\n     */\n    function unstakePrime(address primeTokenAddress, uint256 amount) internal {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n       \n        uint256 currentStaked = DiamondStorageLib.getStakedTokenAmount(primeTokenAddress);\n        require(amount <= currentStaked, \"Insufficient staked amount\");\n\n        uint256 remainingStake = currentStaked - amount;\n        DiamondStorageLib.removeStakedTokenAmount(primeTokenAddress, amount);\n        \n        emit PrimeUnstaked(msg.sender, amount, remainingStake, block.timestamp);\n    }\n\n\n    /// Events\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Emitted when PRIME tokens are staked\n     * @param user The user who staked\n     * @param amount The amount staked\n     * @param totalStaked The total amount staked after this operation\n     * @param timestamp When the staking occurred\n     */\n    event PrimeStaked(\n        address indexed user, \n        uint256 amount, \n        uint256 totalStaked, \n        uint256 timestamp\n    );\n\n     /**\n     * @dev Emitted when PRIME tokens are unstaked\n     * @param user The user who unstaked\n     * @param amount The amount unstaked\n     * @param totalStaked The total amount staked after this operation\n     * @param timestamp When the unstaking occurred\n     */\n    event PrimeUnstaked(\n        address indexed user, \n        uint256 amount, \n        uint256 totalStaked, \n        uint256 timestamp\n    );\n\n    \n}","keccak256":"0x36484d71ef5fa9e5e82b4c2acf3ccf63fda3d1d3dbd20ffa5f6e6c9595acf961","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/arbitrum/DeploymentConstants.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n// Last deployed from commit: 8c36e18a206b9e6649c00da51c54b92171ce3413;\npragma solidity 0.8.17;\n\nimport \"../../interfaces/ITokenManager.sol\";\nimport {DiamondStorageLib} from \"../../lib/DiamondStorageLib.sol\";\n\n/**\n * DeploymentConstants\n * These constants are updated during test and prod deployments using JS scripts. Defined as constants\n * to decrease gas costs. Not meant to be updated unless really necessary.\n * BE CAREFUL WHEN UPDATING. CONSTANTS CAN BE USED AMONG MANY FACETS.\n **/\nlibrary DeploymentConstants {\n\n    // Used for LiquidationBonus calculations\n    uint256 private constant _PERCENTAGE_PRECISION = 1000;\n\n    bytes32 private constant _NATIVE_TOKEN_SYMBOL = 'ETH';\n\n    address private constant _NATIVE_ADDRESS = 0x82aF49447D8a07e3bd95BD0d56f35241523fBab1;\n\n    address private constant _DIAMOND_BEACON_ADDRESS = 0x62Cf82FB0484aF382714cD09296260edc1DC0c6c;\n\n    address private constant _SMART_LOANS_FACTORY_ADDRESS = 0xFf5e3dDaefF411a1dC6CcE00014e4Bca39265c20;\n\n    address private constant _TOKEN_MANAGER_ADDRESS = 0x0a0D954d4b0F0b47a5990C0abd179A90fF74E255;\n\n    address private constant _ADDRESS_PROVIDER = 0x6Aa0Fe94731aDD419897f5783712eBc13E8F3982;\n\n    address private constant _FEES_TREASURY_ADDREESS = 0x764a9756994f4E6cd9358a6FcD924d566fC2e666;\n\n    address private constant _STABILITY_POOL_ADDREESS = 0x6B9836D18978a2e865A935F12F4f958317DA4619;\n\n    address private constant _GMX_DATA_STORE_ADDRESS = 0xFD70de6b91282D8017aA4E741e9Ae325CAb992d8;\n    \n    address private constant _GMX_READER_ADDRESS = 0x470fbC46bcC0f16532691Df360A07d8Bf5ee0789;\n\n    address private constant _GLV_READER_ADDRESS = 0x2C670A23f1E798184647288072e84054938B5497;\n\n    //implementation-specific\n\n    function getPercentagePrecision() internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        return _PERCENTAGE_PRECISION;\n    }\n\n    //blockchain-specific\n\n    function getNativeTokenSymbol() internal pure returns (bytes32 symbol) {\n        return _NATIVE_TOKEN_SYMBOL;\n    }\n\n    function getNativeToken() internal pure returns (address payable) {\n        return payable(_NATIVE_ADDRESS);\n    }\n\n    function getGmxDataStoreAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _GMX_DATA_STORE_ADDRESS;\n    }\n    \n    function getGmxReaderAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _GMX_READER_ADDRESS;\n    }\n\n    function getGlvReaderAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _GLV_READER_ADDRESS;\n    }\n\n    //deployment-specific\n\n    function getDiamondAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _DIAMOND_BEACON_ADDRESS;\n    }\n\n    function getSmartLoansFactoryAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _SMART_LOANS_FACTORY_ADDRESS;\n    }\n\n    function getTokenManager() internal pure returns (ITokenManager) {\n        return ITokenManager(_TOKEN_MANAGER_ADDRESS);\n    }\n\n    function getAddressProvider() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _ADDRESS_PROVIDER;\n    }\n\n    function getTreasuryAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _FEES_TREASURY_ADDREESS;\n    }\n\n    function getStabilityPoolAddress() internal pure returns (address) {\n        return _STABILITY_POOL_ADDREESS;\n    }\n\n    /**\n    * Returns all owned assets keys\n    **/\n    function getAllOwnedAssets() internal view returns (bytes32[] memory result) {\n        DiamondStorageLib.SmartLoanStorage storage sls = DiamondStorageLib.smartLoanStorage();\n        return sls.ownedAssets._inner._keys._inner._values;\n    }\n}","keccak256":"0x0f02b0b60396d2dce170a948ef777e23c79eb857885a15000b8597e0caf658ac","license":"BUSL-1.1"},"contracts/lib/joe-v2/Constants.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n\npragma solidity ^0.8.10;\n\n/**\n * @title Liquidity Book Constants Library\n * @author Trader Joe\n * @notice Set of constants for Liquidity Book contracts\n */\nlibrary Constants {\n    uint8 internal constant SCALE_OFFSET = 128;\n    uint256 internal constant SCALE = 1 << SCALE_OFFSET;\n\n    uint256 internal constant PRECISION = 1e18;\n    uint256 internal constant SQUARED_PRECISION = PRECISION * PRECISION;\n\n    uint256 internal constant MAX_FEE = 0.1e18; // 10%\n    uint256 internal constant MAX_PROTOCOL_SHARE = 2_500; // 25% of the fee\n\n    uint256 internal constant BASIS_POINT_MAX = 10_000;\n\n    /// @dev The expected return after a successful flash loan\n    bytes32 internal constant CALLBACK_SUCCESS = keccak256(\"LBPair.onFlashLoan\");\n}\n","keccak256":"0xa972f7798c31cc2dc4eb2c0749ea3f7972574c2bcea85fbe41dae40f99ff266d","license":"MIT"},"contracts/lib/joe-v2/PriceHelper.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\n\npragma solidity ^0.8.10;\n\nimport {Uint128x128Math} from \"./math/Uint128x128Math.sol\";\nimport {Uint256x256Math} from \"./math/Uint256x256Math.sol\";\nimport {SafeCast} from \"./math/SafeCast.sol\";\nimport {Constants} from \"./Constants.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title Liquidity Book Price Helper Library\n * @author Trader Joe\n * @notice This library contains
